summary: A reposted clip consisting of fixed security-camera footage of a storefront walkway outside a shop with a 'VAPE CBD' sign, parked cars, traffic cones and a 'Front Entrance' label, with a date-and-time stamp reading 04-02-2026. The sampled frames show an altercation: a person in motion on the walkway, then a person lying on the ground while another person stands nearby beside a bicycle. The tweet text carries a graphic-content warning.

script.scene: A fixed security-camera view of a storefront walkway with a 'VAPE CBD' sign, parked cars and cones; on-screen stamp reads 04-02-2026.
A person is captured mid-motion on the walkway near the storefront.
A person lies on the walkway while another person stands nearby beside a bicycle, with a red highlight box added around the area.
